nasb.text: So they sent messengers to the inhabitants of Kiriath-jearim, saying, “The Philistines have brought back the ark of the Lord; come down and take it up to you.”

esv.text: So they sent messengers to the inhabitants of Kiriath-jearim, saying, “The Philistines have returned the ark of the Lord. Come down and take it up to you.”

cnv.text: 於是他們派遣使者到基列．耶琳的居民那裡去，對他們說：“非利士人把耶和華的約櫃送回來了。你們下來把它接到你們那裡去吧。”

ccb.text: 后来，他们就派使者到基列·耶琳的居民那里，说：“非利士人已经把耶和华的约柜送回来了，你们下来把它接到你们那里吧。”
